pages.purpose: Founder enters company and product context for demo setup.

important_elements.label: Product / company context form
important_elements.selector_hint: form fields for product name, product description, target customer, and prospect type
important_elements.why: Needed for onboarding and demo personalization.

important_elements.label: Qualification questions
important_elements.selector_hint: section or list for buyer qualification questions
important_elements.why: Shows what the founder provides to qualify leads.

important_elements.label: CTA / next step
important_elements.selector_hint: button or field labeled CTA, next step, or call to action

allowed_actions.label: Highlight setup inputs
allowed_actions.intent: Show the founder-provided context used to generate the demo.

pages.purpose: AI content and agent output generation from founder context.

important_elements.label: Generate content / agent output
important_elements.selector_hint: button or panel labeled generate, create, or run
important_elements.why: Demonstrates how the AI output is produced.

important_elements.label: Knowledge or walkthrough source
important_elements.selector_hint: editor, sidebar, or tab for walkthrough, approved Q&A, and knowledge base
important_elements.why: Shows the source material used by the demo agent.

important_elements.label: Preview output
important_elements.selector_hint: preview pane for generated copy or agent behavior
important_elements.why: Lets the founder inspect generated content safely.

pages.purpose: Buyer-facing demo room where the prospect asks questions and receives a guided demo.

important_elements.label: Chat / question input
important_elements.selector_hint: text input, chat box, or ask a question area
important_elements.why: Core interaction for the AI-led demo experience.

important_elements.label: AI response area
important_elements.why: Shows the agent answering questions from knowledge.

important_elements.label: Highlight / show page tool
important_elements.selector_hint: control for highlight, show, or guide the user
important_elements.why: Supports safe visual guidance during the demo.

allowed_actions.label: Highlight question input
allowed_actions.intent: Show where the prospect interacts with the demo agent.

allowed_actions.label: Explain how the demo room works
allowed_actions.intent: Describe that the buyer gets a personalized link and can ask questions in the AI-led experience.

pages.purpose: Founder sees CRM summary, qualification, and follow-up after the prospect finishes.

important_elements.label: Lead qualification summary
important_elements.selector_hint: summary card or section for buyer fit, intent, and qualification
important_elements.why: Shows the post-demo outcome for the founder.

important_elements.label: Follow-up output
important_elements.selector_hint: notes, email draft, or follow-up recommendation panel
important_elements.why: Shows what the founder receives after the demo.

important_elements.label: CRM record or export
important_elements.selector_hint: CRM sync, export, or lead memory section
important_elements.why: Represents the handoff into founder workflow.

flows.goal: Show the full founder journey from setup to prospect demo to follow-up.

steps.say: Here the founder provides product context, walkthrough, approved Q&A, and qualification details.
This is where AI output is generated from the founder's inputs.
The prospect gets a personalized demo link and can ask questions in the demo room.
After the demo, the founder receives qualification and follow-up output.

approved_answers.answer: A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.
The MVP should use an approved manifest and visual event playback. Playwright is better for setup-time extraction and validation. Live app control can come later for approved low-risk paths.
Yes. Gemini Live or a LiveKit voice agent can call the same safe demo tools used by text: show page, move cursor, highlight, propose click, answer from knowledge, and update lead memory.

notes: No crawled pages were provided, so routes and selector hints are generic and intentionally non-specific.
Clicks were avoided because only obviously safe actions should be allowed without page crawl evidence.

decisions.question: What does the founder need to provide?
decisions.reply: A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.

events.say: Let’s start with founder setup: product context, persona, goals, and qualification inputs.
Here are the core inputs the founder provides to personalize the demo.

decisions.reason: This directly answers the setup requirement and shows the relevant approved page and element.

decisions.question: Show me the agent/content console.
decisions.reply: This is where AI output is generated from the founder's inputs.

events.say: Now we’re in the agent/content console.
This preview shows the generated demo output from the founder’s context.

decisions.reason: The request is to show the console, so we use the approved page and highlight the generated preview.

decisions.question: Show the prospect demo room.
decisions.reply: The prospect gets a personalized demo link and can ask questions in the demo room.

events.say: This is the buyer-facing demo room.
This is where the prospect asks questions during the AI-led demo.

decisions.reason: This shows the buyer-facing experience and the safe interaction point.

decisions.question: Show me what the founder receives after the demo.
decisions.reply: After the demo, the founder receives qualification and follow-up output.

events.say: Here’s the post-demo founder summary.
This is the follow-up output and qualification summary the founder gets.

decisions.reason: This directly shows the post-demo deliverable in the approved founder summary page.

success.success_rule: MVP-usable means at least 3/4 expected app areas discovered, at least 6 safe/reviewable actions, no invented manifest pages/action refs, and at least 3/4 prospect questions planned to the right page/action.
